'''tazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:diapirically|diapirically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:diapirically|diapirically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tazate|tazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tazatesher|tazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazatesherĂ«m|tazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tazatero|tazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tazateshĂ«|tazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazateshĂ«m|tazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitazatero|gokitazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitazateshĂ«|gokitazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitazateshĂ«m|gokitazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotazankerom|gotazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotazankeshĂ«|gotazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotazankeshĂ«m|gotazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotazankeya|gotazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tazaterom|tazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazatemu|tazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tazateya|tazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitazaterom|gokitazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitazatemu|gokitazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitazateya|gokitazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tazazate|tazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tazazatesher|tazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazazatesherĂ«m|tazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tazazatero|tazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tazazateshĂ«|tazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazazateshĂ«m|tazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitazazatero|gokitazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitazazateshĂ«|gokitazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitazazateshĂ«m|gokitazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotazazankerom|gotazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotazazankeshĂ«|gotazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotazazankeshĂ«m|gotazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotazazankeya|gotazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tazazaterom|tazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazazatemu|tazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tazazateya|tazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitazazaterom|gokitazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitazazatemu|gokitazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitazazateya|gokitazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠzĂŠte|tĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠzĂŠtesher|tĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠzĂŠtero|tĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzĂŠtero|gokitĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠzĂŠterom|tĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠzĂŠtemu|tĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠzĂŠteya|tĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzĂŠterom|gokitĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzĂŠteya|gokitĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafzafte|tafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafzaftesher|tafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafzaftesherĂ«m|tafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafzaftero|tafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafzafteshĂ«|tafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafzafteshĂ«m|tafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafzaftero|gokitafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafzafteshĂ«|gokitafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafzafteshĂ«m|gokitafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafzafnkerom|gotafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafzafnkeshĂ«|gotafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafzafnkeshĂ«m|gotafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafzafnkeya|gotafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafzafterom|tafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafzaftemu|tafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafzafteya|tafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafzafterom|gokitafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafzaftemu|gokitafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafzafteya|gokitafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
